text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: May I ask what you thought of my running today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the most part, she was as confident as ever on
the track...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But now that I think about it, she might have
looked a little tired.
choice_data_list: You seemed to be struggling a bit.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So you thought the same... Perhaps I should start
paying more attention to my body's needs and
give myself some rest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not that you're at fault, of course. We've both
been pushing ourselves a little too hard of late.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We must both strive to keep one another at the
top of our game.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf has a point. It might be wise to
rethink our schedule.
